leadText: Sand Veil (Japanese: すながくれ Hidden in Sand) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.2 Outside of battle 1.2.1 Generation VIII 1.2.2 Generation IX Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] During a sandstorm , the accuracy of any move used against a Pokémon with this Ability is modified by a factor of 4 / 5 (approximated as a factor of 3277/4096 since Generation V). A Pokémon with this Ability will take no damage from the sandstorm if it otherwise would. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] From Pokémon Emerald onwards, if a Pokémon with Sand Veil is in the first place in the party (even if fainted ) in an area with a sandstorm (such as Route 228 in Sinnoh ), the chance of encountering a wild Pokémon is decreased by 50%. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] This Ability appears to have no effect on encounter rate in Pokémon Sword and Shield . Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] This Ability appears to have no effect on encounter rate in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet .

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] During a sandstorm , the accuracy of any move used against a Pokémon with this Ability is modified by a factor of 4 / 5 (approximated as a factor of 3277/4096 since Generation V). A Pokémon with this Ability will take no damage from the sandstorm if it otherwise would.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Boosts Evasion if there is a sandstorm. MD T D S Boosts the Pokémon's evasiveness during a sandstorm. B S L てんきが すなあらしだと かいひが あがる MD GtI Unavailable S MD The Pokémon isn't damaged by a sandstorm, and its evasiveness goes up while the sandstorm is in effect! MD RT DX The Pokémon isn't damaged by the Sandstorm weather condition, and its evasiveness goes up while a sandstorm is in effect.
